1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch

1 I 0 0110001001 4 mismatch

1 I 3 0100010101 4 mismatch

Binary 03
1 AND 03 0100000001 2 mismatch
1 AND 03n 1011111110 8 mismatch
1 OR 03 0110011101 6 mismatch
1 OR 03n 1001100010 4 mismatch

Choosing right
1 I 0

Selected
0 I 2
1 XOR 03
2 XOR 14
3 XOR 25
4 XOR 36
5 XOR 47
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 10011010
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 XOR 03 = XOR(I 0,I 3) = XOR(1,1) = 0
2 XOR 14 = XOR(I 1,I 4) = XOR(0,1) = 1
3 XOR 25 = XOR(I 2,I 5) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 XOR 36 = XOR(I 3,I 6) = XOR(1,1) = 0
5 XOR 47 = XOR(I 4,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
6 I 5 = 0
7 I 6 = 1

\boxed{00100001}
